caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is situated in a studio with a wall of dark grey acoustic foam panels. He is wearing a white t-shirt and over-ear black headphones. A professional microphone is positioned in front of him, attached to a boom arm with the text "Rode PSA1" visible on the arm. A tattoo is partially visible on his right upper arm. As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking, and his mouth opens and closes slightly. He maintains a focused expression, looking slightly off-camera to his right. The background and his positioning remain static throughout the sequence, with only subtle changes in his facial movements as he speaks into the microphone.
